topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that control smart plugs and devices based on temperature and weather conditions, optimizing energy use by turning devices on or off in response to environmental changes.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Temperature drops below from SmartThings THEN Set temperature using Nest Thermostat based on sensor temp.
IF Temperature drops below 19C from Netatmo Weather Station THEN increase Netatmo thermostat to 20C for 2 hours.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN turn on using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF Current humidity level rises above 80% from Weather Underground THEN turn on dehumidifier using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF Current condition changes to rain from Weather Underground THEN turn on using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF Current condition changes to rainy from Weather Underground THEN turn on using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN turn on bedroom heater using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current temperature drops below 15deg from Weather Underground THEN turn on Wemo Heater using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current temperature drops below 32 degrees from Weather Underground THEN turn on heater using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN turn on heater using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current condition changes to snow from Weather Underground THEN turn on outdoor Xmas lights using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current condition changes to raining from Weather Underground THEN turn on light using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Indoor temperature less than from ecobee THEN turn off ceiling fan using WeMo Light Switch.
IF Indoor temperature greater than from ecobee THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Temperature drops below from ThermoSmart THEN turn off lights using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN turn AC unit on using Daikin Online Controller.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN turn on D-Link Smart Plug.
IF Current condition changes to from Weather Underground THEN turn on D-Link Smart Plug.
IF Current temperature drops below 10°C from Weather Underground THEN power off device using Energenie Mi|Home.
IF Current condition changes to snow from Weather Underground THEN turn on roof heater using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF Current humidity level rises above 65% from Weather Underground THEN toggle switch in Telldus Live!
IF Current pollen count rises above 10 from Weather Underground THEN set operation mode to High using Samsung Air Purifier.
IF Current humidity level rises above a configured threshold from Weather Underground THEN set operation mode to Dry using Samsung Floor Air Conditioner.
IF Current humidity level rises above a configured threshold from Weather Underground THEN set operation mode to Dry using Samsung Room Air Conditioner.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN turn A/C on using Sensibo.
IF Current temperature drops below 45 from Weather Underground THEN turn A/C on using Sensibo.
IF Current temperature drops below a configured threshold from Weather Underground THEN switch on using SmartThings.
IF Temperature rises above 75 degrees from SmartThings THEN turn A/C off using Sensibo.
IF Temperature drops below a configured threshold from SmartThings THEN turn A/C off using Sensibo.
IF Temperature rises above a configured threshold from ThermoSmart THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Temperature rises above a configured threshold from ThermoSmart THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Temperature rises above a configured threshold from SmartThings THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current temperature rises above 69 from Weather Underground THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current temperature rises above 70°F from Weather Underground THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current temperature drops below freezing from Weather Underground THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground THEN turn on calefaction using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground THEN turn on using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF Current temperature drops below a configured threshold from Weather Underground THEN turn on heater using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF moisture detected from SmartThings THEN switch on sump pump using SmartThings.
IF Temperature drops below 47 degrees from SmartThings THEN switch off using SmartThings.
IF Humidity rises above a configured threshold from SmartThings THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Temperature rises above a configured threshold from Wink: Spotter THEN turn A/C on using Sensibo.
IF Temperature rises above a configured threshold from Wink: Spotter THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Temperature rises above a configured threshold from Wink: Spotter THEN turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Temperature is too high from Wireless Tag THEN turn A/C on using Sensibo.
IF Temperature is too low from Wireless Tag THEN turn A/C off using Sensibo.
IF Switched on from WeMo Smart Plug THEN set temperature using ThermoSmart.
IF Temperature drops from Netatmo Weather Station THEN turn on using WeMo Insight Switch.
